creator: freebsd@moosefs.com
text:
Created attachment 169767
Update to the newest stable version (2.0.89-1)

This is a small change and passes QA (portlint, poudriere).


Recent changes since MooseFS 2.0.88:

* MooseFS 2.0.89-1 (2016-04-27)

  - (master+mount) added fix for bug in FreeBSD kernel (kernel sends truncate before first close - FreeBSD only)


You can find more info related to the fixed issue here:

https://sourceforge.net/p/moosefs/mailman/moosefs-users/thread/55986.128.135.52.6.1461249217.squirrel%40cosmo.uchicago.edu/#msg35031042
